data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: OpenAI's deployment on cloud services to manage growing data and traffic.
data.technical_spec: Built on a multi-cloud architecture with load balancing and autoscaling.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Centralized interface for accessing different AI models and endpoints.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using industry-standard API management platforms.

data.title: Data Processing Pipeline
data.description: Ensures efficient handling and processing of large datasets.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes big data tools like Apache Kafka and Spark.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Components are organized as small, independent services.
data.technical_spec: Deployed in containerized environments such as Docker and Kubernetes.

data.title: Authentication and Authorization
data.description: Manages user identities and access controls.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates OAuth 2.0 and JWT for secure user sessions.
